metadata.title: MedStudyakademie z.s. | Integration of foreigners and healthcare workers in the Czech Republic
metadata.description: Nonprofit MedStudyakademie helps foreigners, healthcare workers and their families integrate into Czech society. Education, counselling and support — free of charge.

hero.title: Integration. Education. Support.
hero.subtitle: We help foreigners, healthcare workers and their families integrate into Czech society. Free of charge.

about.title: Who we are
paragraphs: We are the nonprofit association MedStudyakademie z.s., founded with one goal: to help those in difficult life situations find their path in the Czech Republic.

Our team consists of professionals and volunteers who know from personal experience what it means to start life in a new country. We work with foreigners, healthcare workers and other groups who need support during integration.
All our services — educational programmes, counselling and cultural events — are provided free of charge.

items.title: Educational programmes
items.description: We organise Czech language courses, preparatory programmes for university admission and educational events for foreigners in the Czech Republic.

items.title: Support for healthcare workers
items.description: We help Ukrainian doctors, dentists and nurses complete the approval process and integrate into the Czech healthcare system.

items.title: Social and cultural activities
items.description: We host cultural events, community meetings and social initiatives that help foreigners feel part of Czech society.

items.title: Counselling
items.description: We provide individual advice on documents, legalisation, employment and adapting to life in the Czech Republic.

items.title: Partnerships and projects
items.description: We cooperate with public institutions, universities and NGOs on social integration and exclusion prevention projects.

items.title: Additional support
items.description: We help with housing searches, paperwork and organise meetings with lawyers, psychologists and other specialists.

items.label: Ukrainian healthcare workers in the Czech Republic since 2022

groups.title: University applicants
groups.description: Young people from Ukraine and other countries who want to study at Czech universities and earn a European degree.

groups.title: Healthcare workers
groups.description: Doctors, dentists, pharmacists and nurses who want to work officially in their profession in the Czech Republic.

groups.title: Foreigners and their families
groups.description: People who have moved to the Czech Republic and need support adapting — from language to documents.

partners.title: Partners and cooperation
partners.text: We are open to cooperation with public authorities, educational institutions, corporate partners and other NGOs. If you would like to support our work or implement a joint project — get in touch.

volunteer.title: Become a volunteer
volunteer.text: Our organisation runs thanks to volunteers. If you want to help people and speak Czech, Ukrainian or other languages — we would love to welcome you to the team.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

validation.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters

footer.legalNote: Activities are carried out in accordance with Czech law and ethical standards.
footer.googleWorkspaceVerification: MedStudyakademie z.s. is a registered nonprofit association in the Czech Republic providing free educational and integration services to foreigners and healthcare workers.
